title: selaginella subfimbriata var. polyura
intro: Selaginella subfimbriata var. polyura is a species of spore-producing plant in the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spike moss. It is a type of medicinal herb traditionally used in various parts of the world, particularly in Asia, to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
